text:
Terminal velocity achieved. We shipped the official `polli` CLI this week. Because sometimes you just want to generate things without leaving your terminal or writing a fetch request. Just install it and you're off.

We also added kre8.info to the community showcase — they're doing some wild prompt-to-video shorts using our infrastructure. We love seeing what happens when we just provide the pipes and get out of the way.

Code's open, API's free. Come build something weird. 🐝✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #cli #terminal #generativeai #buildinpublic #developer #techcommunity
